headline: Gartner Flags AI Power Surge As Clients Rework Budgets And Adoption Plans
summary: Gartner (NYSE:IT) is flagging a sharp rise in global data centre electricity consumption tied to AI expansion, according to its latest forecasts. The company is also reporting that many enterprises are stuck in pilot mode on AI projects, based on recent conferences and surveys. These findings indicate shifts in technology budgets and brand strategies as organizations rethink AI adoption and marketing priorities. For you as an investor watching Gartner (NYSE:IT), the key point is how its...
